papers.title: Tutor Intelligence builds Data Factory to train robot AI in the real world
papers.title_zh: Tutor Intelligence builds Data Factory to train robot AI in the real world
papers.tldr_zh: Tutor Intelligence is running 100 Sonny semi-humanoid robots
papers.cover_zh: Tutor Intelligence is running 100 Sonny semi-humanoid robots
papers.abstract_zh: Tutor Intelligence is running 100 Sonny semi-humanoid robots in its headquarters while sharing technology and data with its Cassie mobile manipulator. The post Tutor Intelligence builds Data Factory to train robot AI in the real world appeared first on The Robot Report .
